CustomField.description: Currently included in Account__r.ZipCode field, so we have to parse the Zip+4 from that field (CounselingRecord_ClientRequest_AddressPart1_Zip4Code)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Currently included in Account__r.ZipCode field, so we have to parse the Zip+4 from that field (CounselingRecord_ClientRequest_AddressPart1_Zip4Code)
CustomField.label: Zip4Code_AddressPart1
